title: Software Development

personal_info.summary: Motivated computer science student with strong interest in software development and game development. Experienced in Python programming, web development, and building small projects. Passionate about learning new technologies and solving real-world problems through programming.

skills: Python Programming  Unreal Engine 5  Basic C++  Game Design Basics  SQL Fundamentals  FL Studio  Music Production  Problem Solving
